product_overview: A web-based manufacturing inventory management system built with Laravel 12 and Tailwind, covering master data, stock movements, purchase & production workflows, stock opname, reporting and role-based user management.
core_goals: Provide end-to-end inventory lifecycle support: receipts, issues, transfers, production consumption, and adjustments
Maintain accurate, auditable stock records and prevent negative stock via transactions and validations
Support PO and production workflows with approvals, receiving, and stock updates
Enable regular physical stock reconciliation (stock opname) and automated adjustments
Offer role-based access controls so admin and operational roles have appropriate privileges
Deliver actionable reports (stock summary, low stock, movement history) for decision making

features.name: User Login
features.description: Authenticate users with email and password using Laravel Breeze and redirect to the dashboard on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with admin@inventory.com -> Fill password input field with password -> Click Login button -> Redirect to /dashboard
Navigate to /login -> Fill email input field with wrong@example.com -> Fill password input field with wrongpass -> Click Login button -> See validation error on wrong credentials

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: Display high-level stats, low stock alerts and recent stock movements for quick operational awareness.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View total items count card -> View low stock count card -> View pending purchase orders count card -> View active work orders count card -> View low stock alert list -> View recent stock movements list
Navigate to /dashboard -> If not authenticated, redirect to /login

features.name: Category Management
features.description: Create, read, update, and delete item categories with simple forms and confirmation dialogs.
user_flows: Navigate to /categories -> View list of categories in table -> Click Tambah Kategori button to open create form -> Fill name and description fields -> Submit form to create category -> See new category in list

Navigate to /categories -> Click Tambah Kategori button to open create form -> Fill name field with an existing category name -> Submit form to create category -> See validation error for duplicate name

features.name: Item Management
features.description: Manage inventory items with search, category/status filters, per-warehouse stock view and min/max thresholds.
user_flows: Navigate to /items -> Search items by code or name -> Filter by category dropdown -> Filter by active/inactive status -> View low stock badge on items below minimum

Navigate to /items -> Click /items/create -> Select category and unit from dropdowns -> Set min and max stock values -> Fill required fields -> Submit form to create item -> See item in list with per-warehouse stock accessible via /items/{id}
Navigate to /items -> Click /items/create -> Leave required fields blank -> Submit form to create item -> See validation errors for required fields

features.name: Supplier Management
features.description: CRUD suppliers and view supplier details including recent purchase orders.
user_flows: Navigate to /suppliers -> View list of suppliers -> Click /suppliers/create -> Fill supplier fields -> Submit form to create supplier -> See new supplier in list
Navigate to /suppliers -> Click a supplier to open /suppliers/{id} -> View supplier detail with recent POs -> If supplier has no POs show empty recent POs list
Navigate to /suppliers -> Click /suppliers/create -> Submit form with invalid contact format -> See validation error

features.name: Warehouse Management
features.description: Manage warehouses and view stock tables per warehouse.
user_flows: Navigate to /warehouses -> View list of warehouses -> Click /warehouses/create -> Fill warehouse name and location -> Submit form to create warehouse -> See warehouse in list
Navigate to /warehouses -> Click a warehouse to open /warehouses/{id} -> View warehouse detail with stock table -> If warehouse has no stock show empty table
Navigate to /warehouses -> Click /warehouses/create -> Submit form with duplicate name -> See validation error

features.name: Stock Movement
features.description: Record goods receipts, issues, transfers and adjustments with dynamic form fields and movement details.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-movements -> Click /stock-movements/create -> Select movement type 'Transfer' -> Select item from dropdown -> Select source warehouse -> Select destination warehouse -> Enter quantity and unit price -> Submit form to record movement -> See movement detail with reference number at /stock-movements/{id}

Navigate to /stock-movements -> Click /stock-movements/create -> Select movement type 'Material Issue' -> Select item and source warehouse -> Enter quantity greater than available stock -> Submit form to record movement -> See insufficient stock error

features.name: Purchase Order Management
features.description: Create purchase orders with dynamic lines, approve/cancel them, and receive goods per PO line to update stock.
user_flows: Navigate to /purchase-orders -> Click /purchase-orders/create -> Select supplier and dates -> Add dynamic line items -> Enter quantity and unit price per line -> See auto-calculate line subtotals and grand total -> Submit form to create PO (Draft) -> Open PO detail at /purchase-orders/{id} -> Click Approve to change status to approved
Navigate to /purchase-orders/{id} -> If PO is approved click /purchase-orders/{id}/receive -> Input received quantities per line item -> Submit receive -> See PO status updated and stock increased
Navigate to /purchase-orders/{id}/receive -> Attempt to receive goods for a PO still in draft status -> See validation error preventing receive

features.name: Production Order (Work Order) Management
features.description: Create and process production orders that consume input materials and produce output products, with start/complete/cancel lifecycle.
user_flows: Navigate to /production-orders -> Click /production-orders/create -> Enter description, dates, and select warehouse -> Dynamically add input material rows -> Dynamically add output product rows -> Submit form to create WO -> Open WO detail at /production-orders/{id} -> Click Start production -> System issues materials from stock -> Click Complete production -> System adds output products to stock and marks WO completed
Navigate to /production-orders/{id} -> Click Start production when available materials are insufficient -> See insufficient stock error and prevent start

features.name: Stock Opname
features.description: Perform physical stock counts by warehouse, save counts, view differences, and apply adjustments when completing an opname session.
user_flows: Navigate to /stock-opnames -> Click /stock-opnames/create -> Select warehouse and date -> System loads all items and their system quantities -> Input physical count for each item -> Click Save physical count (/stock-opnames/{id}/save-count) -> View difference column (system vs physical) -> Click Complete opname (/stock-opnames/{id}/complete) -> Adjustments applied to actual stock and opname marked completed
Navigate to /stock-opnames/{id} -> Attempt to complete opname without saving any physical counts -> See validation error preventing completion

features.name: Reports
features.description: Provide stock summary, low stock, and movement history reports with filtering and export-ready views for analysis.
user_flows: Navigate to /reports/stock-summary -> Filter stock summary by warehouse -> See aggregated stock per item and totals
Navigate to /reports/low-stock -> View low stock items with deficit calculation -> Use warehouse filter to scope results
Navigate to /reports/movement-history -> Set item, type and date range -> If end date is before start date -> See validation error for invalid date range

features.name: User Management (Admin)
features.description: Admin-only CRUD for users with role assignment and safeguards (cannot delete own account), presented with role badges and active status.
user_flows: Navigate to /users -> View user list with role badges -> Click /users/create -> Fill name, email, password, role and active status -> Submit form to create user -> See new user in list
Navigate to /users -> As non-admin user attempt to open /users -> See 403 forbidden due to role-based access control
Navigate to /users -> Select a user and click delete -> Confirm deletion -> If deleting own account attempt -> See prevented action and error message

routes.description: Dashboard with stats, low stock alerts, recent movements
List items with search/filter by category and status
Item detail with stock per warehouse and recent movements
List stock movements with type/item/date filters
Create stock movement form (goods receipt / issue / transfer / adjustment)
List purchase orders with status/supplier filters
Create purchase order with dynamic line items
Receive goods form per PO line item
List work orders with status filter
Create work order with input materials and output products
Opname detail with physical count input and complete/cancel actions
Stock summary report with warehouse filter
Low stock report - items below minimum stock level
Movement history report with item/type/date filters

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email and password credentials
user_interactions: Fill email input field
Fill password input field
Click Login button
See validation error on wrong credentials
Redirect to dashboard on success

features.name: Dashboard Overview
features.description: View stats cards, low stock alerts, and recent movements
user_interactions: View total items count card
View low stock count card
View pending purchase orders count card
View active work orders count card
View low stock alert list
View recent stock movements list

features.name: Category Management
features.description: CRUD for item categories
user_interactions: View list of categories in table
Click Tambah Kategori button to open create form
Fill name and description fields
Submit form to create category
Click Edit to open edit form
Update category fields and submit
Click Hapus to delete category with confirmation dialog

features.name: Item Management
features.description: CRUD for inventory items with search and filtering
user_interactions: Search items by code or name
Filter by category dropdown
Filter by active/inactive status
View low stock badge on items below minimum
Click Tambah Item to create new item
Select category and unit from dropdowns
Set min and max stock values
View item detail with per-warehouse stock and recent movements

features.name: Stock Movement
features.description: Record stock mutations - goods receipt, material issue, transfer, adjustment
user_interactions: Select movement type which shows/hides warehouse fields dynamically via JavaScript
Select item from dropdown
Select source or destination warehouse based on type
Enter quantity and unit price
Submit form to record movement
View movement detail with reference number

features.name: Purchase Order Management
features.description: Create and manage purchase orders with approval workflow
user_interactions: Create PO with supplier, dates and dynamic line items (add/remove rows)
Auto-calculate line subtotals and grand total in real-time
View PO detail with status badge
Approve PO (changes status from draft to approved)
Navigate to receive goods form for approved POs
Input received quantities per line item
Cancel PO with confirmation dialog

features.name: Production Order (Work Order) Management
features.description: Create and manage production work orders with material consumption
user_interactions: Create WO with description, dates, warehouse, input materials and output products
Dynamically add/remove input material rows
Dynamically add/remove output product rows
View WO detail with status
Start production which issues materials from stock
Complete WO which adds output products to stock
Cancel WO with confirmation

features.name: Stock Opname
features.description: Perform physical stock count and apply adjustments
user_interactions: Create opname session selecting warehouse and date
System loads all items and their system quantities
Input physical count for each item
Save physical count
View difference column (system vs physical)
Complete opname to apply adjustments to actual stock
Cancel opname

features.name: Reports
features.description: Stock summary, low stock, and movement history reports with filters
user_interactions: Filter stock summary by warehouse
View low stock items with deficit calculation
Filter movement history by item, type, and date range

features.name: User Management
features.description: Admin-only user CRUD with role assignment
user_interactions: View user list with role badges
Create user with name, email, password, role and active status
Edit user details and optionally change password
Delete user with confirmation (cannot delete own account)

known_limitations.issue: Role-based access control limits certain actions by role; tests should use admin@inventory.com for full access
known_limitations.impact: Non-admin roles may receive 403 on certain routes

known_limitations.issue: Stock mutations require existing stock records; operations may fail if stock is zero
known_limitations.impact: Material issue and transfer may throw insufficient stock errors
